'''Skine Bounty Hunter College''' was a member house of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]. It employed specialists who were considered to be at the top of their trade in a variety of fields.

Imperial Governor [[Wilek Nereus]] once sent sixteen [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to the college to receive special training as his "elite" guard, which he called the "[[Protectorate]]."<ref name="TBSB">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'', p 47</ref> Other alumni of the college included [[Zeed Venom]]<ref name="LAA">''[[Live-Action Adventures]]''</ref> and the Reenogga Sisters; [[Adri Reenogga|Adri]], [[Vella Reenogga|Vella]] and [[Kara Reenogga|Kara]].<ref name="SWAJ5">{{JournalCite|5|Zirtran's Anchor (article)}}</ref>
